query:
SELECT 'commercial_assets' as tbl, id, name FROM commercial_assets WHERE name LIKE '%Sprint%' OR name LIKE '%Test%' OR source LIKE '%test%';
SELECT 'scan_jobs' as tbl, id, status FROM scan_jobs WHERE status LIKE '%test%' LIMIT 5;
